intro: The technology and cybersecurity sectors were the most frequent targets in a concentrated wave of AI security incidents documented from April 12 to 20, 2026. This archive of 38 reports details activity from the threat actor OpenClaw and widespread exploitation of the critical vulnerability CVE-2026-5760, which carries a CVSS score of 9.8. The healthcare, AI-development, and artificial intelligence sectors were also heavily affected in a global pattern of attacks. The severity of these events was significant, with 5 classified as critical and 17 as high, alongside numerous medium and informational alerts.
